# Task Log - 12-20-2025_15-48

## Task: Add TextGame UI Type to Cartridge JSON Files

### Objective
Add the `UIType` field to the cartridge JSON file format to specify which UI should be used when loading a game cartridge.

### Changes Made

1. **Updated CartridgeData Model** (`GameLibrary\TextGame\Models\CartridgeData.cs`)
   - Added `UIType` property with default value of "TextGame"
   - Added XML documentation explaining the property's purpose
   - This property determines which UI window will be launched when the cartridge is loaded

2. **Created/Updated Cartridge JSON Files**
   - Created `Cartridge/Examples/HauntedMansion.ucart/HauntedMansion.json` with `UIType: "TextGame"`
   - Created `Cartridge/Examples/LostCave.ucart/LostCave.json` with `UIType: "TextGame"`
   - Created `Cartridge/Examples/Template.ucart/Template.json` with `UIType: "TextGame"`

### Technical Details

The `UIType` field is positioned in the JSON structure after the `Description` field and before `StartingRoomId`:

```json
{
  "Title": "...",
  "Author": "...",
  "Version": "...",
  "Description": "...",
  "UIType": "TextGame",
  "StartingRoomId": "...",
  "Rooms": [...],
  "Items": [...]
}
```

### Build Status
? Build successful - all changes compile without errors

### Notes
- The `UIType` property has a default value of "TextGame" to maintain backward compatibility
- All example cartridges now include the UIType field
- The CartridgeLoader can now use this field to determine which UI implementation to launch
